options.name: -encrypt
options.description: Encrypts the generated capacitance table to protect the process information in the capacitance table header.

options.name: -ict
options.description: To support multiple process corners, a capacitance table should be created for each corner from the matching corner ICT file.

options.name: -incaptable
options.description: Specifies the name of an existing capacitance table in ASCII format.

options.name: -lef
options.description: Specifies the name and the full path to the process LEF file for optimal accuracy.

options.name: -output
options.description: Specifies the output filename that contains the capacitance table.

options.name: -shrinkFactor
options.description: Specifies the value by which the measurements in the optional LEF file have to be shrunk for the technology used with this design.

options.name: -xcap
options.description: Specifies the cross-coupling capacitance scaling factor.
